title: AgentEvaluationOutputSchema
description: Schema for agent task evaluation run outputs.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation run.

dataset_id.description: Identifier of the evaluation dataset used.

query_id.description: Identifier for the matched test case query.

actual_tools_used.description: List of tools actually called by the agent during the run.

generated_answer.description: The final answer produced by the agent.

steps_taken.description: The number of reasoning-action steps taken by the agent.

task_success.description: Whether the agent successfully completed the task instructions.

tool_call_accuracy.description: Precision/recall or similarity score of actual vs expected tool calls.

results.description: List of outputs corresponding to the agent test cases.
